raw_title: Can Anthropic’s AI Claude be trusted in combat? | The Take
raw_content: Can Anthropic’s AI Claude be trusted in combat?| The Take Tools from Anthropic and OpenAI are being used by the Pentagon to make military decisions in Iran, guiding decisions could cost lives. Fast, powerful, or flawed, how have AI systems already changed how wars are fought? The post Can Anthropic’s AI Claude be trusted in combat? | The Take appeared first on AI Now Institute.
